name: @quoin/tokens-lightning
description: Salesforce Lightning Design System palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: SLDS '2' tokens (light scheme). Salesforce ships @salesforce-ux/design-system-tokens with utility, component, and theme layers; this pack uses the global + alias layers. Salesforce Sans is proprietary; referenced by family name only.
